name: flow-lease-held-and-takeover
description: Tier 2: host-a enters and holds a flow open (no complete/crash). A second holder, host-b, tries to enter the SAME flow identity while host-a's lease is still fresh and is refused with KEEL-E030. Once the clock advances past the 30s lease TTL, host-b's next entry succeeds (the lease is stealable once expired) and it runs the flow to completion. Stubs skip tier-2 scenarios; the real core runs this in crates/keel-core/tests/flows_conformance.rs.
